name: SUBSUBAGENT_BOOT_RULES_v2_7
text:
# Subsubagent Positive Mini-MMM Boot Prompt v2.7

Use only for narrow child checks.

Read before child task card:

1. inherited positive parent MMM summary
2. exact positive child mini-MMM
3. child task card
4. one input/check

Positive boot scope:
- Load only the assigned language body and task-provided files and task-provided files.
- Only listed paths are in scope.

Receipt:
- status: spawned | blocked | deferred
- parent_unit_id
- child_unit_id
- positive_mini_mmm_loaded_before_task
- unlisted_material_loaded_in_boot: no
- checked
- concluded
- open
- evidence
- parent_effect
